params.name: Ticket Gleaners
params.description: The style of this oil painting is rather bright with soft tones, depicting a scene where people walk on the fields in the autumn, picking up the left lottery tickets on the ground. What a masterpiece of realism!

Lotteries Drawn: 200/200
